clang++ CMakeFiles/ziv_compiler.dir/tools/test_lexer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ziv_compiler.dir/src/ast/expression_ast.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ziv_compiler.dir/src/ast/node_ast.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ziv_compiler.dir/src/lexer/lexer.cpp.o -o bin/ziv_compiler   -L/usr/lib/llvm-18/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/lib/llvm-18/lib /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libMLIR.so.18.1 /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libLLVMCore.a /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libLLVMSupport.a /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libLLVMBinaryFormat.a /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libLLVMRemarks.a /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libLLVMBitstreamReader.a /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libLLVMTargetParser.a /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libLLVMSupport.a /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libLLVMDemangle.a -lrt -ldl -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libzstd.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libtinfo.so -Wl,-rpath-link,/usr/lib/llvm-18/lib
